hero.eyebrow: Global Communications Spine · Sovereign AI Orchestration
hero.tagline: From the first message to the millionth, DOLPHLINK is the **Singapore-based communications spine** built for **governments and regulated enterprises**. We orchestrate **SMS, voice, and the AI-Human Lifecycle** into one **carrier-grade fabric**, partnering with you through every step of the **migration to sovereign, next-generation customer engagement**.

video.title: Connect Every Customer.
video.subtitle: One platform for global SMS, voice, phone numbers, and AI-Human conversation, with migration support every step from legacy to next-generation operations.

reliability.placeholder: Select a metric to inspect details

stats.label: Uptime
stats.desc: **Five-nines reliability** across **geo-redundant points of presence**. Engineered for **mission-critical** communications with **independently verified SLA** and quarterly third-party attestation.

stats.label: Countries
stats.desc: **Direct interconnect** with **600+ tier-1 mobile operators** worldwide for **unmatched reach** and **carrier-grade message quality** across every region, including last-mile coverage in regulated and emerging markets.

stats.label: Delivery
stats.desc: **SMS reaches recipients in under 10 seconds** via **tier-1 carrier routes**, verified across **global benchmarks**, audited **quarterly**, and continuously optimized through **real-time route intelligence**.

stats.label: Lifecycle
stats.desc: From **assist** to **augment** to **autonomous**, then **seamless handoff back to human**. DOLPHLINK manages the **full AI-Human Lifecycle**. Bots handle the routine, agents handle the nuance, and **continuous learning** improves every iteration. **Built-in migration tooling** moves legacy workflows to next-generation operations on your timeline, with **full audit trails** at every handoff.

portfolios.placeholder: Select a product to inspect details

items.label: SMS Platform
items.desc: Direct connections to **600+ tier-1 mobile operators** for global SMS in **under 10 seconds**. **Developer-first API** with comprehensive docs and unique keys, plus built-in **Pages** mobile landing pages, **Campaigns** for personalized bulk messaging, and **two-way messaging** via Short Codes, Long Numbers, and Opt-in keywords.

items.label: Voice & SIP
items.desc: **Geo-redundant SIP trunking** with **text-to-speech**, audio notifications, call forwarding, and **DTMF input**. **Detailed per-call insights** for **fraud monitoring** and anti-fraud controls. Built for **contact centers, SMBs, and IP PBX resellers**.

items.label: Phone Numbers
items.desc: Instant access to **local, national, mobile, and toll-free numbers in 100+ countries**. **Alphanumeric Sender IDs**, Short Codes, and **Hosted Numbers** (SMS/Voice on existing landlines without switching carriers). Built-in **Compliance Intelligence** automatically evaluates each region's regulatory requirements.

items.label: Dolphlink Touch
items.desc: **Unified business messaging hub.** One platform for **SMS, WhatsApp, RCS, Email**, and emerging channels. **Marketing-friendly templates**, drag-and-drop campaign builder, and **intelligent automatic fallback** that switches channels if delivery fails. Built for revenue, marketing, and customer engagement teams.

items.label: Dolphlink API
items.desc: **One programmable API** across SMS, voice, WhatsApp, Email, and emerging channels. **Drop-in SDK** with **intelligent automatic fallback** that switches channels if primary delivery fails. Engineered for developers building **mission-critical workflows**.

items.label: Dolphlink Smart
items.desc: **No-code conversation builder** for **AI-Human workflows**. Bots handle the routine, human agents handle the nuance, and **seamless handoffs** keep every conversation continuous. **Context-aware understanding** from your own data, with **ISO 27001, GDPR, and RBAC** built in for regulated environments.

items.label: Dolphlink Nexus
items.desc: **NEW · The sovereign command center for AI-Human orchestration.** Unifying every bot, RPA flow, custom model, and human reviewer into one auditable control plane, engineered for governments and regulated enterprises with built-in migration support, full data residency, RBAC, and activity logs.

items.label: Operations Hub
items.desc: **Messaging Gateway** centralizes API codes and key management. **Message Log** delivers full transparency on every message: status, content, and **real-time costs**. **Aggregated insights** and **real-time trends** to optimize every communication strategy.

items.label: AI-Digital Solutions
items.desc: **Tailored AI-Digital migration services** for existing infrastructure projects. We engineer bespoke integrations between your legacy systems and DOLPHLINK's communications, AI orchestration, and compliance layers, delivered on **your timeline, your data residency, and your governance requirements**.

items.title: Compliance Certified
items.desc: **ISO 27001 and GDPR certified.** Pursuing PDPA Singapore and MAS TRM alignment for ASEAN financial services, third-party audited annually.

items.title: Data Sovereignty
items.desc: **Sovereign-grade infrastructure rooted in Singapore**, with regional data residency spanning ASEAN, EMEA, and the Americas. Every customer record stays in the precise jurisdiction your regulator demands. **Audited quarterly with full chain-of-custody attestation.**

items.title: Verified Reliability
items.desc: **99.999% verified uptime** across geo-redundant points of presence. TLS 1.3 in transit, AES-256 at rest, with **quarterly third-party penetration testing**.

items.title: Access Governance
items.desc: **Role-based access control (RBAC)** across the entire platform. Fine-grained permissions for every team, tenant, and workflow, with **detailed activity logs and SSO integration** built in.
